title: ajuga decumbens
intro: Ajuga decumbens, also known as manjishtha, is a type of flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia. It is used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ajuga decumbens include reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as supporting eye health. In herbal preparations, Ajuga decumbens is often used to make teas, decoctions, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
